chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 331 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of reference as office objection No. 2,7,14,18,20 & 25 are not complied with since 07.09.2018 15.10.2025 This reference application is pending since 2018 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Despite several opportunities matter remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution as even office objections are not stated to have been complied with since 07.09.2018. Applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant department is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
